title: nonatelia moralesii
intro: Nonatelia moralesii, also known as 'Tecoma', is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nonatelia moralesii include its potential to treat digestive issues, fever, and infections, as well as its ability to act as a natural diuretic. The herbal preparation of the plant typically involves drying the leaves and flowers to make teas or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
